name: AI Business Toolkit
summary: Practical AI guides, prompts, and playbooks for small and medium businesses. 200+ prompts, 12 automation playbooks, 37-page adoption roadmap. From €19, one-time purchase. Free 5-day email course included.

pricing.notes: One-time purchase, no subscription. 30-day money-back guarantee via Gumroad.

plans.name: AI Prompt Library for Business
features: Organized by department (Marketing, Sales, HR, Operations, Finance, Customer Service)

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: E-commerce and Retail
features: 58 AI prompts for online store owners
8 categories: Product Descriptions, SEO Titles, Ad Copy, Email Flows, Customer Support, Social Media, Pricing & Promos, Upsell & Cross-sell

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: Tradespeople
features: 54 AI prompts for plumbers, electricians, cleaners, landscapers, salons
9 categories: Quoting & Estimating, Invoicing, Customer Communication, Complaints, Reviews, Social Media, Hiring, Admin & Compliance, WhatsApp Scripts

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: Restaurants
features: 50 AI prompts for restaurant owners, café operators
10 categories: Menus, Reviews, Social Media, Customer Comms, Reservations, Staff, Supplier, Marketing, Delivery, WhatsApp Scripts

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: Photographers
features: 10 categories: Client Enquiry, Pricing, Wedding, Portrait, Instagram, Reviews, Gallery Delivery, Marketing, Admin, Quick Replies

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: SME Operations
features: 100 AI prompts for small business owners
10 departments: Customer Service, Marketing, Sales, HR, Operations, Finance, Strategy, Team & Culture, Legal & Compliance, AI Productivity Hacks

plans.name: AI Prompt Pack: Real Estate
features: 8 categories (Property Listings, Client Communication, Lead Generation, Market Analysis, Marketing Content, Transaction Management, Client Onboarding, Social Media & Personal Branding)
For real estate agents, brokers, and property managers
Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot

api.notes: Digital guide products, not software. No API.

trust_signals: Structured data markup (JSON-LD) on all pages
Listed on Product Hunt, SaaSHub, TAAFT, and other directories
missing_information: No testimonials or customer logos yet (product launched March 2026)
